allow: Bash(cmd //c "powershell -NoProfile -Command \\"Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\\\\\"name='node.exe'\\\\\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List\\"")
Bash(sleep 2 && npx prisma generate 2>&1 | tail -8 && rm -f node_modules/.prisma/client/query_engine-windows.dll.node.tmp*)
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,CPU,WS,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(rm -f node_modules/.prisma/client/query_engine-windows.dll.node.tmp* 2>&1; sleep 2; npx prisma generate 2>&1 | tail -4)
Bash(copilot -p "Return only this JSON: {\\"ok\\": true}" --silent --stream off --no-auto-update)

Bash(node -e "const {spawnSync} = require\('child_process'\); const r = spawnSync\('codex', ['--version'], {encoding:'utf8', timeout:5000}\); console.log\('codex stdout:', r.stdout, 'stderr:', r.stderr, 'status:', r.status, 'error:', r.error?.message\)")

Bash(node -e "const {spawnSync} = require\('child_process'\); const r = spawnSync\('copilot', ['--version'], {encoding:'utf8', timeout:5000}\); console.log\('copilot stdout:', r.stdout, 'stderr:', r.stderr, 'status:', r.status, 'error:', r.error?.message\)")

Bash(node -e "const {spawnSync} = require\('child_process'\); const r = spawnSync\('codex', ['--version'], {encoding:'utf8', timeout:5000, shell:true}\); console.log\('stdout:', r.stdout, 'status:', r.status, 'error:', r.error?.message\)")
Bash(node -e "const {spawnSync} = require\('child_process'\); const r = spawnSync\('copilot', ['--help'], {encoding:'utf8', timeout:10000, shell:true}\); console.log\(r.stdout\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const {spawnSync} = require\('child_process'\); const r = spawnSync\('codex', ['--version'], {encoding:'utf8', timeout:5000}\); console.log\('status:', r.status, 'error:', r.error?.code\)")
Bash(timeout 10 bash -c 'echo "Say only: {\\"ok\\": true}" | copilot --silent --no-auto-update --allow-all-tools --stream off 2>&1')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP" | Where-Object {$_.Extension -match "\\.png|\\.jpg|\\.jpeg|\\.webp"} | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table Name, LastWriteTime)
Bash(timeout 35 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; echo -n "."; done && echo "READY"')

Bash(timeout 40 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3003 >/dev/null 2>&1 || curl -sf http://localhost:3002 >/dev/null 2>&1 || curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && echo "READY"')

PowerShell($p = ".skillproof"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $files = Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $mb = [math]::Round\(\($files | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB,1\); "skillproof_files=$\($files.Count\) size_MB=$mb"; "nm_dirs=" + \(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Directory -Filter node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; "run_dirs=" + \(Get-ChildItem "$p\\runs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count } else { "no .skillproof" })
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table")

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\('public/hero-cv.png'\).convert\('RGB'\); print\(img.getpixel\(\(5,5\)\)\); print\(img.getpixel\(\(10,10\)\)\); print\(img.getpixel\(\(2,2\)\)\)")
